name: A trashy street
description:
You step carefully around piles of garbage as you walk down this street.  This
area seems to be the uptown of the slums, as houses are made out of old wooden
planks probably stolen from the nicer parts of Dimrill Dale.  To your west is
what was a fine jewelry shop.  Now, as all of Dimrill Dale's forces are gone
fighting the evil armies, it has been broken into and most of it is in pieces.
